titleStmt.title: SII 11.154: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 154. (A.R. No. 455 of 1926). KANAKŪR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A PILLAR SET UP IN THE TEMPLE OF KANAKAMMA.

summary.p: This damaged inscription in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) who was ruling from his capital Viḷāsa[pura]. It registers the gift of the village Kanakāpura in Kundūr Five-Hundred for burning incense in the temple of Sōmanāthadēva of the Saurāshṭra vishaya by Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Jayakēśidēva at the time of his marriage, under the direction of the king. Jayakēśidēva is styled Koṁkaṇādhipati. Another gift to Vāmana-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, the Ūroḍeya of Kanakāpura, is mentioned in the earlier portion.
Jayakēśidēva of this record is apparently the Kādaṁba prince Jayakēśin II, the son-in law of Vikramāditya VI. This inscription would thus furnish the earliest date for him.
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year [27], Subhānu, Māgha śu, 13, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1104, January 11, Monday; f.d.t. 07.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
completely damaged
putra
dyaṁ kā
da vaṁdyalōkā
dhā raṁ yasyāna
vanakānte dānaṁ varuṇa
ka mōhapā
baṁdhaṁ . ya
kuṁkumakāṁtavarṇaṁ kubē
ramukhyaḥ paramārtthakāmaṁ Uda
viśvamanō hēśa
khyaṁ paribhāva syānananī
didēvairva
hitāṁgayōgaiḥ . dhyātvāṣṭasiddhi
madhigamya citraṁ nirvvāṇasaukhyaṁ ni
jataṁtramiṣṭaṁ . yaṁ ṇnaṁ
Ēṣa kṛttiṁ vasānaṁ va
ra vāma
ṣaṇnakāmaṁ vicitrabhūṣaṁ vidhirā
dēvaṁ triśūlakhaṭvāṁgakṛpāṇa
rakṣā svākṣākṣamālākaḷitāka
rāḷiḥ . yasyāparōḍḍāmara pā
śanāganīlōtpalābhīṣṭaphaḷā
kṣmātaṁ paṁcavaktraṁ daśabāhu mi
śaṁ vidyānidhānaṁ girijāmukhākṣaṁ
Ātmānuraktēṁdumahāvibhūṣaṁ sa
pātu kāmaṁ manasā bhajēyaṁ . Ārā
dhitaṁ saṁstutimuktavācaṁ dhyātaṁ kadaṁ
baṁ nijabhāvarūḍhaṁ taṁ śaṁkarākhyāma
yā(ṁ)ntaṁ namāmi bhūyō
nasvarūpaṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī
pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva
ra vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkka tā
raṁ saluttamire śrīmadrāja
dhāni viḷāsapuradalu sukhasaṁkathā
vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire śrī
matpracaṁḍa cakracāru
tāṁghriḥ
cāḷukya vipuḷāyatadugdha
vārddhicaṁdrō vibhāti nitarāṁ para mēśva
rōyaṁ . svasti samastaguṇasaṁpaṁ
na raśēṣavidyāviśāradarappa śrīmada
grahāra kanakāpura dūroḍeya vāma
nabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarggaṁ svasti śrī maccāḷu
kyavikramavarṣada 27 neya su
bhānusaṁvatsarada māgha śuddha 13 sōma
vāradaṁdu śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva
ravara tammaṁdiru svayaṁpāka puru
ṣōttamabhaṭṭōpādhyāya
kīṟiviṭṭu dēvālyavoṁ
samaya 50 gadyāṇa
poṁnaṁ piṁḍādānadiṁdaṁ dharmmavattaḷe yiṁ ti
ṟuvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi Ā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ koṭṭarā
radiṁ tiṟutaṁ baṁda śrīmatka lla
varasaru svasti samastasurāsu
rānīkamakuṭarajaḥpuṁjitarama
ṇīyaratnanikuruṁbacuṁbacuṁba śuṁ ba
ḍḍiṁbakadaṁbacuṁbitapadāṁbhōja sama sta
lōkaprasāritatēja gaurīkucakaḷa
sakuṁkumapaṁkāṁkitaviśāḷōrasthaḷaru
mappa śrīsaurāṣṭraviṣayabhūṣaṇa
nappa śrīsōmanāthadēvara dhūpakkaṁ
koṭṭu dēvara brahmapuriyāgi naḍa
vuttamiralu śrīmatu koṁkaṇādhi
pati śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ jaya
kēsidēvara vivāhōtsava kāladalli
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru kuṁdū
raināṟaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ kanakāpure
vaṁ śrīsaurāṣṭrada śrīsōmanātha dēvara dhūpakke ko
ṭṭevadu ninna dharmmavāgi nī kuḍeṁ du bēḍalu baravoḷḷi
ttaṁdā dēvarigāragiyalu dhārāpū rvvakaṁ māḍi jaya
kēsidēva rācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ koṭṭaru . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa
sahasrāṇi svarggē vasati bhūmidaḥ Ācchēttācānu
maṁtā ca tāvēva narekē vasēt . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvva rṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . pūrvvadattāṁ haranbhū
miṁ narakāyōpapadyatē . viṁdhyāṭa vēṣvatō
yēṣu śuṣkakōṭaravāsinaḥ . kṛṣṇa sarpā hi jāyaṁ
tē yē haraṁti vasundharāṁ . pataṁtya śrūṇi ru
datāṁ dīnānāmavasīdatāṁ . vēdārtthapaṁḍitadēva
rṣipaṁḍitaru pramukhavāgi śrīmaccā turjjāta
karellāra samarpaṇeyiṁda mārkaṁḍē yarāśi
ya pratiṣThe .
Digital edition of SII 11.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
